{{CargoClone
|name=Madam Huang
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=168
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Refine +1 Green Gaia Material +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Mecha Minion Skin RUSH +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Mecha Minion Skin RUSH +50%
|}}
